  // 解析 [Tag]XXX[/Tag] 格式的标签
  const parseTags = (content) => {
    const tagRegex = /\[([^\s\[\]\/]+)(?:\s[^\[\]]*?)?\]([\s\S]*?)\[\/\1\]/g;
    const tags = [];
    let match;
    while ((match = tagRegex.exec(content)) !== null) {
      tags.push({ name: match[1], content: match[2].trim() });
    }
    return tags;
  };

  // 重新组合所有Tag为All格式
  const rebuildAllContent = (tags) => {
    return tags.map(tag => `[${tag.name}]\n${tag.content}\n[/${tag.name}]`).join('\n');
  };

  const openUI = async () => {
    injectStyles();
    const cfg = loadCfg();
    const tplBase = (cfg.tplRaw && typeof cfg.tplRaw === 'object') ? cfg.tplRaw : cfg.tpl;
    let draft = tplBase ? {
      scaffold: Array.isArray(tplBase.scaffold)? tplBase.scaffold.map(x=>({...x})) : [],
      specialIndex: tplBase.specialIndex, specialRoleType: tplBase.specialRoleType,
      historyDepth: tplBase.historyDepth, includeWorldInfo: !!tplBase.includeWorldInfo
    } : (()=>{ const d=parseTopToDraft(extractTop(cfg.commands||'')); if(!Array.isArray(d.scaffold)) d.scaffold=[]; return d; })();
    if ((draft.historyDepth !== undefined || draft.includeWorldInfo) && !Number.isInteger(draft.specialIndex)) {
      draft.specialIndex = 0;
      draft.specialRoleType = draft.specialRoleType || 'system';
    }
    const userPrefInit = normalizeUserPref(cfg.userPref);
    const apiCfg = loadApiCfg();
    const root = buildPanelShell('Công cụ phân tích thông minh Ny-Sigon ');
    const themeIcon = $('ny_theme_icon');
    const themeToggleBtn = $('xiaobaix_theme_toggle');
    let currentTheme = loadUiTheme();
    const applyUiTheme = (theme, persist = true) => {
      currentTheme = normalizeUiTheme(theme);
      root.setAttribute('data-theme', currentTheme);
      if (themeIcon) {
        themeIcon.classList.remove('fa-moon', 'fa-sun', 'fa-cloud-moon', 'fa-cloud-sun');
        themeIcon.classList.add(currentTheme === UI_THEME_SUN ? 'fa-cloud-sun' : 'fa-cloud-moon');
      }
      if (themeToggleBtn) {
        const nextTheme = currentTheme === UI_THEME_SUN ? UI_THEME_MOON : UI_THEME_SUN;
        const nextLabel = nextTheme === UI_THEME_SUN ? 'Chuyển sang tông màu kem' : 'Chuyển sang chế độ ban đêm';
        themeToggleBtn.title = nextLabel;
        themeToggleBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', nextLabel);
      }
      if (persist) saveUiTheme(currentTheme);
    };
    applyUiTheme(currentTheme, false);
    on(themeToggleBtn, 'click', () => {
      const nextTheme = currentTheme === UI_THEME_SUN ? UI_THEME_MOON : UI_THEME_SUN;
      applyUiTheme(nextTheme);
    });

    const mask = root.querySelector('.mask');
    const pageOutput = $('xiaobaix_page_output');
    const pageSettings = $('xiaobaix_page_settings');
    const showPage = (name) => {
      const isOutput = name === 'output';
      if (pageOutput) pageOutput.style.display = isOutput ? 'flex' : 'none';
      if (pageSettings) pageSettings.style.display = isOutput ? 'none' : 'block';
    };
    showPage('output');
    root.style.display = 'flex';
    const roles = $('xiaobaix_roles_container');
    const runBtn = $('xiaobaix_sum_run');
    let isBusy = false;
    let streamTimer = null;
    let floorTimer = null;
    let streamEnabled = !!apiCfg.stream;
    let lastStreamShown = '';
    let recalcDirty = () => {};
    let markAllSaved = () => {};
    
    // 存储当前解析的tags用于编辑
    let currentTags = [];
    let tagEditHandlersBound = false;

    let userPrefInsertAt = Number.isInteger(userPrefInit.insertAt) ? userPrefInit.insertAt : null;
    const refreshUserPrefInsertOptions = () => {
      const sel = $('xiaobaix_userpref_insert_at');
      if (!sel) return;

      const view = [];
      const sc = Array.isArray(draft.scaffold) ? draft.scaffold : [];
      const hasS = Number.isInteger(draft.specialIndex);
      for (let i = 0, ri = 0; i < sc.length + (hasS ? 1 : 0); i++) {
        if (hasS && i === draft.specialIndex) view.push({ kind: 'special' });
        else view.push({ kind: 'role', idx: ri++ });
      }

      const total = view.length;
      const selVal = String(sel.value ?? '').trim();
      const currentRaw = selVal !== '' && Number.isFinite(+selVal) ? Math.floor(+selVal) : null;
      const desired = Number.isInteger(currentRaw) ? currentRaw : (Number.isInteger(userPrefInsertAt) ? userPrefInsertAt : total);
      const chosen = Math.max(0, Math.min(desired, total));

      const labelForBoundary = (boundary) => {
        if (boundary === 0) return 'Đầu tiên';
        const item = view[boundary - 1];
        if (item?.kind === 'special') return `Sau mục thứ ${boundary}（Khe Thông tin thế giới/Lịch sử）`;
        const role = sc[item?.idx]?.role || 'user';
        return `Sau mục thứ ${boundary}（${role}）`;
      };

      sel.innerHTML = Array.from({ length: total + 1 }, (_, i) => `<option value="${i}">${h(labelForBoundary(i))}</option>`).join('');
      sel.value = String(chosen);
      userPrefInsertAt = chosen;
    };
    
    const setRunBtnBusy = (busy) => {
      if (!runBtn) return;
      if (isBusy === busy) return;
      isBusy = busy;
      runBtn.disabled = !!busy;
      runBtn.innerHTML = busy ? '<i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin"></i> <span>Đang xuất...</span>' : '<i class="fas fa-play"></i> <span>Phân tích ngay</span>';
      const ind = $('xiaobaix_running_indicator');
      if (ind) {
        if (busy) ind.classList.remove('hidden');
        else ind.classList.add('hidden');
      }
    };
    const attachStreamMonitor = () => {
      clearInterval(streamTimer);
      streamTimer = setInterval(() => {
        try {
          const genSvc = window.xiaobaixStreamingGeneration;
          const status = genSvc?.getStatus?.(SESSION_ID);
          const busy = !!status?.isStreaming;
          setRunBtnBusy(busy);
          if (streamEnabled && busy) {
            const current = String(status?.text || '');
            if (lastStreamShown !== current) {
              lastStreamShown = current;
              const ta = $('xiaobaix_sum_output');
              if (ta && ta.value !== current) {
                ta.value = current;
                ta.scrollTop = ta.scrollHeight;
              }
            }
          }
        } catch {}
      }, 150);
    };

    const calcFloorCount = (chatArr, floorType) => {
      const arr = Array.isArray(chatArr) ? chatArr : [];
      if (floorType === 'user') return arr.filter(m => !!m?.is_user).length;
      if (floorType === 'llm') return arr.filter(m => !m?.is_user).length;
      return arr.length;
    };

    const getMainTaskProps = () => {
      try {
        const ref = window.XBTasks?.find?.(TASK_NAME, 'all');
        const t = ref?.task;
        if (!t) return null;
        return {
          enabled: !t.disabled,
          interval: Number.isFinite(+t.interval) ? +t.interval : 0,
          floorType: String(t.floorType || 'all'),
          timing: String(t.triggerTiming || 'any_message')
        };
      } catch {
        return null;
      }
    };

    const renderFloorCounter = () => {
      const elTitle = $('ny_floor_counter');
      const elOutput = $('ny_floor_counter_output');
      const el = elOutput || elTitle;
      if (!el) return;
      const mainProps = getMainTaskProps();
      if (!mainProps || !mainProps.enabled) {
        if (elOutput) elOutput.textContent = 'Bộ đếm kích hoạt OFF';
        if (elTitle) elTitle.textContent = 'OFF';
        const tip = 'Bộ đếm kích hoạt：Chương trình chính NY-Sigon chưa được kích hoạt';
        if (elOutput) elOutput.title = tip;
        if (elTitle) elTitle.title = tip;
        return;
      }
      const interval = Math.max(0, Math.floor(mainProps.interval || 0));
      if (!interval) {
        if (elOutput) elOutput.textContent = 'Bộ đếm kích hoạt 0/0';
        if (elTitle) elTitle.textContent = '0/0';
        const tip = 'Bộ đếm kích hoạt: Chương trình chính NY-Sigon interval=0 (không theo chu kỳ)';
        if (elOutput) elOutput.title = tip;
        if (elTitle) elTitle.title = tip;
        return;
      }
      const context = window.SillyTavern?.getContext?.();
      const chatArr = context?.chat;
      const count = calcFloorCount(chatArr, mainProps.floorType);
      const mod = count % interval;
      const remain = (interval - mod) % interval;
      if (elOutput) elOutput.textContent = `Bộ đếm kích hoạt ${mod}/${interval}`;
      if (elTitle) elTitle.textContent = `${mod}/${interval}`;
      const tip = `触发计数（推算）：用于提示距离下一次自动分析还差多少楼层。\n计数楼层：${count}（floorType=${mainProps.floorType}）\ninterval=${interval}\n还差：${remain} 层触发一次`;
      if (elOutput) elOutput.title = tip;
      if (elTitle) elTitle.title = tip;
    };
    const renderList = () => {
      const view=[]; const sc=Array.isArray(draft.scaffold)?draft.scaffold:[]; const hasS=Number.isInteger(draft.specialIndex);
      for (let i=0,ri=0;i<sc.length+(hasS?1:0);i++){ if(hasS&&i===draft.specialIndex) view.push({kind:'special'}); else view.push({kind:'role',idx:ri++}); }
      roles.innerHTML = view.map((v,pos)=>{
        if (v.kind==='special') return `
          <div class="box" data-kind="special" data-pos="${pos}">
            <div class="role-head">
              <div class="row"><select data-role="special-select">
                <option value="user" ${draft.specialRoleType==='user'?'selected':''}>user</option>
                <option value="assistant" ${draft.specialRoleType==='assistant'?'selected':''}>assistant</option>
                <option value="system" ${draft.specialRoleType==='system'?'selected':''}>system</option>
              </select><b style="color:var(--SmartThemeBodyColor,#e9e9e9)">世界书/历史</b></div>
              <div class="row"><button class="btn sm" data-act="up" title="Di chuyển lên"><i class="fas fa-arrow-up"></i></button><button class="btn sm" data-act="down" title="Di chuyển xuống"><i class="fas fa-arrow-down"></i></button></div>
            </div>
          </div>`;
        const it=sc[v.idx]||{}; const r=it.role||'', txt=it.text||'';
        return `
          <div class="box" data-kind="role" data-pos="${pos}" data-idx="${v.idx}">
            <div class="role-head">
              <div class="row"><select data-role="select">
                <option value="user" ${r==='user'?'selected':''}>user</option>
                <option value="assistant" ${r==='assistant'?'selected':''}>assistant</option>
                <option value="system" ${r==='system'?'selected':''}>system</option>
              </select><b style="color:var(--SmartThemeBodyColor,#e9e9e9)">ROLE</b></div>
              <div class="row"><button class="btn sm" data-act="up" title="Di chuyển lên"><i class="fas fa-arrow-up"></i></button><button class="btn sm" data-act="down" title="Di chuyển xuống"><i class="fas fa-arrow-down"></i></button><button class="btn sm" data-act="del" title="Xóa"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i></button></div>
            </div>
            <textarea data-role="text" rows="5">${h(txt)}</textarea>
          </div>`;
      }).join('') || `<div style="color:#888;font-size:12px">当前无 ROLE。${Number.isInteger(draft.specialIndex)?'':'（未设置特殊插槽）'}</div>`;
      const togg = $('xiaobaix_special_toggle');
      if (togg) togg.innerHTML = Number.isInteger(draft.specialIndex) ? '<i class="fas fa-minus-circle"></i> Xóa khe Thông tin thế giới/Lịch sử' : '<i class="fas fa-layer-group"></i> Thêm khe Thông tin thế giới/Lịch sử';
      refreshUserPrefInsertOptions();
    };
    $('xiaobaix_sum_enabled') && ($('xiaobaix_sum_enabled').checked = !!cfg.enabled);
    $('xiaobaix_sum_interval') && ($('xiaobaix_sum_interval').value = cfg.interval || 0);
    $('xiaobaix_sum_timing') && ($('xiaobaix_sum_timing').value = cfg.timing || 'after_ai');
    $('xiaobaix_sum_floor') && ($('xiaobaix_sum_floor').value = cfg.floorType || 'all');
    $('xiaobaix_sum_hist') && ('historyDepth' in draft) && ($('xiaobaix_sum_hist').value = String(draft.historyDepth ?? ''));
    $('xiaobaix_sum_wi') && ('includeWorldInfo' in draft) && ($('xiaobaix_sum_wi').checked = !!draft.includeWorldInfo);
    const rexFullInput = $('xiaobaix_rex_full');
    if (rexFullInput) rexFullInput.value = cfg.regexCombined || DEFAULT_REGEX_COMBINED;
    const cleanAnchors = $('xiaobaix_clean_anchors');
    const cleanBlocks = $('xiaobaix_clean_blocks');
    const cleanComments = $('xiaobaix_clean_comments');
    if (cleanAnchors) cleanAnchors.value = (cfg.clean?.anchors || []).join('\n');
    if (cleanBlocks) cleanBlocks.value = (cfg.clean?.blockTags || []).join(',');
    if (cleanComments) cleanComments.checked = !!cfg.clean?.stripComments;
    const genCfg = cfg.gen || {};
    $('xiaobaix_gen_temp') && ($('xiaobaix_gen_temp').value = genCfg.temperature ?? '');
    $('xiaobaix_gen_top_p') && ($('xiaobaix_gen_top_p').value = genCfg.top_p ?? '');
    $('xiaobaix_gen_top_k') && ($('xiaobaix_gen_top_k').value = genCfg.top_k ?? '');
    $('xiaobaix_gen_pp') && ($('xiaobaix_gen_pp').value = genCfg.presence_penalty ?? '');
    $('xiaobaix_gen_fp') && ($('xiaobaix_gen_fp').value = genCfg.frequency_penalty ?? '');

    const upEnabled = $('xiaobaix_userpref_enabled');
    const upEnabledTxt = $('xiaobaix_userpref_enabled_text');
    const updateUpBtn = () => {
      if (upEnabled && upEnabledTxt) {
        if (upEnabled.checked) { upEnabledTxt.textContent = '启用中'; }
        else { upEnabledTxt.textContent = 'Bật tùy chỉnh'; }
      }
    };
    if (upEnabled) {
      upEnabled.checked = !!userPrefInit.enabled;
      on(upEnabled, 'change', updateUpBtn);
      updateUpBtn();
    }
    $('xiaobaix_userpref_role') && ($('xiaobaix_userpref_role').value = userPrefInit.role || 'user');
    $('xiaobaix_userpref_before') && ($('xiaobaix_userpref_before').value = userPrefInit.before || DEFAULT_USER_PREF.before);
    $('xiaobaix_userpref_after') && ($('xiaobaix_userpref_after').value = userPrefInit.after || DEFAULT_USER_PREF.after);
    $('xiaobaix_userpref_text') && ($('xiaobaix_userpref_text').value = userPrefInit.text || '');

    // Bản lưu sở thích người dùng（chỉ lưu cục bộ, không xuất theo nhiệm vụ/tiền thiết lập）
    const prefPresetSel = $('xiaobaix_userpref_preset');
    const prefPresetName = $('xiaobaix_userpref_preset_name');
    const prefPresetSaveNew = $('xiaobaix_userpref_preset_save_new');
    const prefPresetSaveOver = $('xiaobaix_userpref_preset_save_over');
    const prefPresetDelete = $('xiaobaix_userpref_preset_delete');
    let prefStore = loadUserPrefStore();
    let prefPresets = Array.isArray(prefStore.presets) ? prefStore.presets.slice() : [];
    let prefSelectedId = String(prefStore.selectedId || '');

    const setPrefStore = (next) => {
      prefStore = next || {};
      prefPresets = Array.isArray(prefStore.presets) ? prefStore.presets.slice() : [];
      prefSelectedId = String(prefStore.selectedId || '');
    };
    const persistPrefStore = (patch = {}) => setPrefStore(saveUserPrefStore(patch));
    const findPresetById = (id) => prefPresets.find((p) => String(p?.id || '') === String(id || '')) || null;
    const renderPrefPresetSelect = () => {
      if (!prefPresetSel) return;
      const options = ['<option value="">（未选择）</option>'].concat(
        prefPresets.map((p) => `<option value="${h(String(p.id || ''))}">${h(String(p.name || '未命名'))}</option>`)
      );
      prefPresetSel.innerHTML = options.join('');
      const ok = !!prefSelectedId && !!findPresetById(prefSelectedId);
      prefPresetSel.value = ok ? prefSelectedId : '';
    };
    const applyPresetToUI = (preset) => {
      if (!preset) return;
      const pref = normalizeUserPref(preset.userPref || preset.data || preset.pref || {});
      const enabledEl = $('xiaobaix_userpref_enabled'); if (enabledEl) { enabledEl.checked = !!pref.enabled; updateUpBtn(); }
      const roleEl = $('xiaobaix_userpref_role'); if (roleEl) roleEl.value = pref.role || 'user';
      const beforeEl = $('xiaobaix_userpref_before'); if (beforeEl) beforeEl.value = pref.before || DEFAULT_USER_PREF.before;
      const afterEl = $('xiaobaix_userpref_after'); if (afterEl) afterEl.value = pref.after || DEFAULT_USER_PREF.after;
      const textEl = $('xiaobaix_userpref_text'); if (textEl) textEl.value = pref.text || '';
      userPrefInsertAt = Number.isInteger(pref.insertAt) ? pref.insertAt : null;
      refreshUserPrefInsertOptions();
      if (prefPresetName) prefPresetName.value = String(preset.name || '');
      recalcDirty();
    };
    const makePresetId = () => `pref_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(16).slice(2)}`;

    renderPrefPresetSelect();
    if (prefPresetName && !prefPresetName.value) prefPresetName.value = '';
    const initialPreset = findPresetById(prefSelectedId);
    if (initialPreset) applyPresetToUI(initialPreset);

    on(prefPresetSel, 'change', () => {
      prefSelectedId = String(prefPresetSel?.value || '');
      persistPrefStore({ selectedId: prefSelectedId });
      const p = findPresetById(prefSelectedId);
      if (p) applyPresetToUI(p);
    });
    on(prefPresetSaveNew, 'click', () => {
      const nm = String(prefPresetName?.value || '').trim() || `偏好 ${prefPresets.length + 1}`;
      const id = makePresetId();
      const entry = { id, name: nm, userPref: normalizeUserPref(readUserPrefFromUI()) };
      const nextPresets = prefPresets.concat([entry]);
      persistPrefStore({ selectedId: id, presets: nextPresets });
      renderPrefPresetSelect();
      toastr?.success?.('Đã lưu thành tệp mới');
    });
    on(prefPresetSaveOver, 'click', () => {
      if (!prefSelectedId) { toastr?.warning?.('Vui lòng chọn một bản lưu trước'); return; }
      const idx = prefPresets.findIndex((p) => String(p?.id || '') === String(prefSelectedId));
      if (idx < 0) { toastr?.warning?.('Bản lưu không tồn tại'); return; }
      const nm = String(prefPresetName?.value || '').trim() || String(prefPresets[idx]?.name || '未命名');
      const nextPresets = prefPresets.slice();
      nextPresets[idx] = { ...nextPresets[idx], name: nm, userPref: normalizeUserPref(readUserPrefFromUI()) };
      persistPrefStore({ presets: nextPresets });
      renderPrefPresetSelect();
      toastr?.success?.('Đã ghi đè bản lưu');
    });
    on(prefPresetDelete, 'click', () => {
      if (!prefSelectedId) { toastr?.warning?.('Vui lòng chọn một bản lưu trước'); return; }
      const nextPresets = prefPresets.filter((p) => String(p?.id || '') !== String(prefSelectedId));
      persistPrefStore({ selectedId: '', presets: nextPresets });
      renderPrefPresetSelect();
      toastr?.success?.('Đã xóa bản lưu');
    });

    // 刷新输出并解析标签
    const refreshOutput = async () => {
      try {
        const v = await STscript('/getvar key=NY-Sigon index=All');
        const content = String(v || '');
        const outputContainer = $('xiaobaix_output_container');
        
        if (!outputContainer) {
          const ta = $('xiaobaix_sum_output');
          if (ta) {
            ta.value = content;
            ta.scrollTop = ta.scrollHeight;
          }
          return;
        }
        
        currentTags = parseTags(content);
        
        if (currentTags.length === 0) {
          outputContainer.innerHTML = `<textarea id="xiaobaix_sum_output" placeholder="暂无" readonly>${h(content)}</textarea>`;
        } else {
          let html = '';
          for (let i = 0; i < currentTags.length; i++) {
            const tag = currentTags[i];
            html += `
              <div class="tag-section" data-tag-name="${h(tag.name)}" data-tag-index="${i}">
                <div class="tag-header" title="点击展开">
                  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px">
                    <div class="tag-back-btn hidden"><i class="fas fa-arrow-left"></i></div>
                    <h5>${h(tag.name)}</h5>
                  </div>
                  <div class="tag-actions">
                    <button class="btn sm tag-edit-btn" data-action="edit" title="Chỉnh sửa"><i class="fas fa-pen"></i></button>
                    <button class="btn sm tag-save-btn hidden" data-action="save" title="Lưu"><i class="fas fa-check"></i></button>
                    <button class="btn sm tag-cancel-btn hidden" data-action="cancel" title="Hủy"><i class="fas fa-times"></i></button>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <textarea class="tag-content" readonly>${h(tag.content)}</textarea>
              </div>
            `;
          }
          outputContainer.innerHTML = html;
        }
      } catch {}
    };

    // 处理Tag编辑事件
    const setupTagEditHandlers = () => {
      const outputContainer = $('xiaobaix_output_container');
      if (!outputContainer || tagEditHandlersBound) return;
      tagEditHandlersBound = true;
      
      outputContainer.addEventListener('click', async (e) => {
        const header = e.target.closest('.tag-header');
        const backBtn = e.target.closest('.tag-back-btn');
        const section = e.target.closest('.tag-section');
        const btn = e.target.closest('button[data-action]');

        if (backBtn && section) {
          e.stopPropagation();
          section.classList.remove('maximized');
          backBtn.classList.add('hidden');
          const all = outputContainer.querySelectorAll('.tag-section');
          all.forEach(el => el.classList.remove('hidden'));
          return;
        }

        if (header && section && !btn) {
          if (!section.classList.contains('maximized')) {
            section.classList.add('maximized');
            const bb = section.querySelector('.tag-back-btn');
            if(bb) bb.classList.remove('hidden');
            const all = outputContainer.querySelectorAll('.tag-section');
            all.forEach(el => { if(el!==section) el.classList.add('hidden'); });
          }
          return;
        }

        if (!btn) return;
        
        if (!section) return;
        
        const action = btn.dataset.action;
        const tagIndex = parseInt(section.dataset.tagIndex, 10);
        const tagName = section.dataset.tagName;
        const textarea = section.querySelector('.tag-content');
        const editBtn = section.querySelector('.tag-edit-btn');
        const saveBtn = section.querySelector('.tag-save-btn');
        const cancelBtn = section.querySelector('.tag-cancel-btn');
        
        if (action === 'edit') {
          // 进入编辑模式
          if (!section.classList.contains('maximized')) {
            section.classList.add('maximized');
            const bb = section.querySelector('.tag-back-btn');
            if(bb) bb.classList.remove('hidden');
            const all = outputContainer.querySelectorAll('.tag-section');
            all.forEach(el => { if(el!==section) el.classList.add('hidden'); });
          }
          textarea.removeAttribute('readonly');
          textarea.dataset.originalContent = textarea.value;
          editBtn.classList.add('hidden');
          saveBtn.classList.remove('hidden');
          cancelBtn.classList.remove('hidden');
          textarea.focus();
        } else if (action === 'cancel') {
          // Hủy chỉnh sửa
          textarea.value = textarea.dataset.originalContent || '';
          textarea.setAttribute('readonly', '');
          editBtn.classList.remove('hidden');
          saveBtn.classList.add('hidden');
          cancelBtn.classList.add('hidden');
        } else if (action === 'save') {
          // 保存编辑
          const newContent = textarea.value.trim();
          
          // 更新currentTags中对应的内容
          if (currentTags[tagIndex]) {
            currentTags[tagIndex].content = newContent;
          }
          
          // 收集所有Tag的当前内容并重建All
          const allSections = outputContainer.querySelectorAll('.tag-section');
          const updatedTags = [];
          for (const sec of allSections) {
            const name = sec.dataset.tagName;
            const content = sec.querySelector('.tag-content').value.trim();
            updatedTags.push({ name, content });
          }
          
          const allContent = rebuildAllContent(updatedTags);
          
          try {
            // 保存到All
            await STscript(`/setvar key=NY-Sigon index=All {{${allContent}}}`);
            const escSetVar = (s) => String(s || '').replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/"/g, '\\"').replace(/\|/g, '｜');
            // 保存到主程序标签变量（确保主程序读取到最新编辑内容）
            await STscript(`/setvar key=NY-Sigon主程序 index=${tagName} "${escSetVar(newContent)}"`);
            
            // 退出编辑模式
            textarea.setAttribute('readonly', '');
            editBtn.classList.remove('hidden');
            saveBtn.classList.add('hidden');
            cancelBtn.classList.add('hidden');
            
            toastr?.success?.(`Đã lưu ${tagName}`);
          } catch (err) {
            console.error('Lưu thất bại:', err);
            toastr?.error?.(`Lưu thất bại: ${err.message || 'Lỗi không xác định'}`);
          }
        }
      });
    };

    await refreshOutput();
    setupTagEditHandlers();
    
    const onTaskExecuted = (e) => {
      if (e?.detail?.name === TASK_NAME) {
        refreshOutput();
        setRunBtnBusy(false);
      }
    };
    window.addEventListener('xb:task:executed', onTaskExecuted);
    const onStreamDoneMessage = (evt) => {
      try {
        const data = evt?.data;
        if (data?.type === 'xiaobaix_streaming_completed' &&
            (data?.payload?.sessionId === SESSION_ID || data?.payload?.sessionId === `xb${SESSION_ID}`)) {
          setRunBtnBusy(false);
          lastStreamShown = '';
          refreshOutput();
        }
      } catch {}
    };
    window.addEventListener('message', onStreamDoneMessage);
    attachStreamMonitor();
    clearInterval(floorTimer);
    floorTimer = setInterval(renderFloorCounter, 400);
    renderFloorCounter();
    renderList();
    const dirtyRows = {
      auto: $('xiaobaix_save_auto_row'),
      tpl: $('xiaobaix_tpl_save_row'),
      clean: $('xiaobaix_clean_save_row'),
      regex: $('xiaobaix_regex_save_row'),
      gen: $('xiaobaix_gen_save_row'),
      userPref: $('xiaobaix_userpref_save_row')
    };
    const setSaveRowVisible = (rowEl, visible) => {
      if (!rowEl) return;
      if (!rowEl.classList.contains('save-row-anim')) {
        rowEl.classList.add('save-row-anim');
        rowEl.classList.remove('hidden');
      }
      if (visible) rowEl.classList.add('visible');
      else rowEl.classList.remove('visible');
    };
    const captureAutoState = () => {
      const intervalRaw = String($('xiaobaix_sum_interval')?.value ?? '').trim();
      const intervalNum = Number(intervalRaw);
      const interval = Number.isFinite(intervalNum) && intervalNum >= 0 ? intervalNum : 0;
      const histRaw = String($('xiaobaix_sum_hist')?.value ?? '').trim();
      const histNum = histRaw === '' ? null : (Number.isFinite(Number(histRaw)) ? Number(histRaw) : null);
      return {
        enabled: !!$('xiaobaix_sum_enabled')?.checked,
        interval,
        timing: String($('xiaobaix_sum_timing')?.value || 'after_ai'),
        floorType: String($('xiaobaix_sum_floor')?.value || 'all'),
        historyDepth: histNum,
        includeWorldInfo: !!$('xiaobaix_sum_wi')?.checked
      };
    };
    const captureTplState = () => {
      const scaffoldRaw = Array.isArray(draft.scaffold) ? draft.scaffold : [];
      const scaffold = scaffoldRaw.map((x) => ({ role: String(x?.role ?? ''), text: String(x?.text ?? '') }));
      return {
        scaffold,
        specialIndex: Number.isInteger(draft.specialIndex) ? draft.specialIndex : null,
        specialRoleType: typeof draft.specialRoleType === 'string' ? draft.specialRoleType : null
      };
    };
    const captureCleanState = () => ({
      anchors: String(cleanAnchors?.value || '').split('\n').map(s=>s.trim()).filter(Boolean),
      blockTags: String(cleanBlocks?.value || '').split(',').map(s=>s.trim()).filter(Boolean),
      stripComments: !!cleanComments?.checked
    });
    const captureRegexState = () => DEFAULT_REGEX_COMBINED;
    const captureGenState = () => {
      const readNum = (id) => {
        const raw = String($(id)?.value ?? '').trim();
        if (raw === '') return null;
        const n = Number(raw);
        return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : null;
      };
      return {
        temperature: readNum('xiaobaix_gen_temp'),
        top_p: readNum('xiaobaix_gen_top_p'),
        top_k: readNum('xiaobaix_gen_top_k'),
        presence_penalty: readNum('xiaobaix_gen_pp'),
        frequency_penalty: readNum('xiaobaix_gen_fp')
      };
    };
    const captureUserPrefState = () => ({
      enabled: !!$('xiaobaix_userpref_enabled')?.checked,
      text: String($('xiaobaix_userpref_text')?.value ?? '')
    });
    const captureAllStates = () => ({
      auto: JSON.stringify(captureAutoState()),
      tpl: JSON.stringify(captureTplState()),
      clean: JSON.stringify(captureCleanState()),
      regex: JSON.stringify(captureRegexState()),
      gen: JSON.stringify(captureGenState()),
      userPref: JSON.stringify(captureUserPrefState())
    });
    let dirtyBaseline = null;
    recalcDirty = () => {
      if (!dirtyBaseline) dirtyBaseline = captureAllStates();
      const now = captureAllStates();
      setSaveRowVisible(dirtyRows.auto, now.auto !== dirtyBaseline.auto);
      setSaveRowVisible(dirtyRows.tpl, now.tpl !== dirtyBaseline.tpl);
      setSaveRowVisible(dirtyRows.clean, now.clean !== dirtyBaseline.clean);
      setSaveRowVisible(dirtyRows.regex, now.regex !== dirtyBaseline.regex);
      setSaveRowVisible(dirtyRows.gen, now.gen !== dirtyBaseline.gen);
      setSaveRowVisible(dirtyRows.userPref, now.userPref !== dirtyBaseline.userPref);
      return now;
    };
    markAllSaved = () => {
      dirtyBaseline = captureAllStates();
      recalcDirty();
    };
    markAllSaved();
    root.addEventListener('input', () => recalcDirty());
    root.addEventListener('change', () => recalcDirty());
    const closeAll = () => {
      window.removeEventListener('xb:task:executed', onTaskExecuted);
      window.removeEventListener('message', onStreamDoneMessage);
      clearInterval(streamTimer);
      clearInterval(floorTimer);
      const r = $(PANEL_ID);
      if (r) r.remove();
    };
    mask?.addEventListener('click', closeAll);
    on($('xiaobaix_sum_close'), 'click', closeAll);
    on($('xiaobaix_sum_show_output'), 'click', () => showPage('output'));
    on($('xiaobaix_sum_show_settings'), 'click', () => showPage('settings'));
    function readGenFromUI() {
      const v = (id) => String(document.getElementById(id)?.value ?? '').trim();
      const n = (raw) => {
        if (raw === '') return undefined;
        const num = Number(raw);
        return Number.isFinite(num) ? num : undefined;
      };
      return {
        temperature: n(v('xiaobaix_gen_temp')),
        top_p: n(v('xiaobaix_gen_top_p')),
        top_k: n(v('xiaobaix_gen_top_k')),
        presence_penalty: n(v('xiaobaix_gen_pp')),
        frequency_penalty: n(v('xiaobaix_gen_fp'))
      };
    }
    function readUserPrefFromUI() {
      return {
        enabled: !!$('xiaobaix_userpref_enabled')?.checked,
        role: 'user',
        before: '# `<user_preference>`为用户明确告知的自身偏好与期待内容\n<user_preference>',
        after: '</user_preference>\n',
        insertAt: 5,
        text: $('xiaobaix_userpref_text')?.value ?? ''
      };
    }
    const saveTaskConfigFromUI = async (toastMsg = '') => {
      try {
        const hist = $('xiaobaix_sum_hist')?.value; 
        if (hist === '' || hist == null) delete draft.historyDepth; 
        else { const n = +hist; Number.isFinite(n) ? (draft.historyDepth = n) : delete draft.historyDepth; }
        const wi = $('xiaobaix_sum_wi'); if (wi) draft.includeWorldInfo = !!wi.checked;
        if ((Number.isFinite(draft.historyDepth) || !!draft.includeWorldInfo) && !Number.isInteger(draft.specialIndex)) {
          draft.specialIndex = (draft.scaffold?.length || 0);
          draft.specialRoleType = draft.specialRoleType || 'system';
          renderList();
        }
        const enabled = !!$('xiaobaix_sum_enabled')?.checked;
        const interval = $('xiaobaix_sum_interval')?.value;
        const timing = $('xiaobaix_sum_timing')?.value || 'after_ai';
        const floorType = $('xiaobaix_sum_floor')?.value || 'all';
        const regexCombined = DEFAULT_REGEX_COMBINED;
        const anchors = String(cleanAnchors?.value || '').split('\n').map(s=>s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
        const blockTags = String(cleanBlocks?.value || '').split(',').map(s=>s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
        const stripComments = !!cleanComments?.checked;
        const clean = { anchors, blockTags, stripComments };
        const gen = readGenFromUI();
        const userPref = readUserPrefFromUI();
        await saveTaskAndTpl({ enabled, interval, timing, floorType, draft, regexCombined, clean, gen, userPref });
        markAllSaved();
        if (toastMsg) toastr?.success?.(toastMsg);
        return true;
      } catch (e) {
        toastr?.error?.(e?.message || 'Lưu thất bại');
        return false;
      }
    };
    on($('xiaobaix_gen_reset'), 'click', async () => {
      ['xiaobaix_gen_temp','xiaobaix_gen_top_p','xiaobaix_gen_top_k','xiaobaix_gen_pp','xiaobaix_gen_fp'].forEach(id => { const el=$(id); if (el) el.value=''; });
      const gen = {};
      await saveTaskAndTpl({
        enabled: !!$('xiaobaix_sum_enabled')?.checked,
        interval: $('xiaobaix_sum_interval')?.value,
        timing: $('xiaobaix_sum_timing')?.value || 'after_ai',
        floorType: $('xiaobaix_sum_floor')?.value || 'all',
        draft,
        regexCombined: DEFAULT_REGEX_COMBINED,
        clean: {
          anchors: String(cleanAnchors?.value || '').split('\n').map(s=>s.trim()).filter(Boolean),
          blockTags: String(cleanBlocks?.value || '').split(',').map(s=>s.trim()).filter(Boolean),
          stripComments: !!cleanComments?.checked
        },
        gen,
        userPref: readUserPrefFromUI()
      });
      markAllSaved();
      toastr?.success?.('Đã xóa tham số tạo');
    });
    on($('xiaobaix_gen_save'), 'click', async () => { await saveTaskConfigFromUI('Tham số tạo sinh đã được lưu'); });
    on($('xiaobaix_save_auto'), 'click', async () => { await saveTaskConfigFromUI('Cài đặt phân tích tự động đã được lưu'); });
    on($('xiaobaix_userpref_save'), 'click', async () => { await saveTaskConfigFromUI('Sở thích người dùng đã được lưu'); });
    on($('xiaobaix_clean_save'), 'click', async () => { await saveTaskConfigFromUI('Cài đặt làm sạch đã được lưu'); });

    on($('xiaobaix_userpref_insert_at'), 'change', () => { userPrefInsertAt = parseInt($('xiaobaix_userpref_insert_at')?.value ?? '', 10); });
    on($('xiaobaix_sum_run'),'click', async()=>{ 
      try{
        if (pageSettings?.style.display !== 'none') {
          const ok = await saveTaskConfigFromUI('');
          if (!ok) return;
        }
        if (streamEnabled) {
          const outputContainer = $('xiaobaix_output_container');
          if (outputContainer) {
            outputContainer.innerHTML = `<textarea id="xiaobaix_sum_output" placeholder="暂无" readonly></textarea>`;
          }
          lastStreamShown = '';
        }
        setRunBtnBusy(true);
        await STscript(`/xbqte ${TASK_NAME}`);
        await refreshOutput();
        setupTagEditHandlers();
      }catch(e){ 
        setRunBtnBusy(false);
      }
    });
    on($('xiaobaix_role_add'),'click', ()=>{ (draft.scaffold ||= []).push({ role:'user', text:'' }); renderList(); recalcDirty(); });
    on($('xiaobaix_special_toggle'), 'click', () => {
      if (Number.isInteger(draft.specialIndex)) {
        delete draft.specialIndex;
        delete draft.specialRoleType;
        renderList();
      } else {
        draft.specialIndex = (draft.scaffold?.length || 0);
        draft.specialRoleType = draft.specialRoleType || 'system';
        renderList();
      }
      recalcDirty();
    });
    roles?.addEventListener('click', (e)=>{
      const btn = e.target.closest('[data-act]'); if (!btn) return;
      const box = btn.closest('[data-kind]'); if (!box) return;
      const kind = box.dataset.kind, pos = +box.dataset.pos;
      const sc = draft.scaffold ||= []; const hasS = Number.isInteger(draft.specialIndex);
      const view = []; for (let i=0,ri=0;i<sc.length+(hasS?1:0);i++){ if(hasS&&i===draft.specialIndex) view.push({kind:'special'}); else view.push({kind:'role',idx:ri++}); }
      const act = btn.dataset.act;
      if (kind==='special') {
        if (!Number.isInteger(draft.specialIndex)) return;
        if (act==='up' && draft.specialIndex>0) draft.specialIndex--;
        if (act==='down' && draft.specialIndex<sc.length) draft.specialIndex++;
        renderList(); recalcDirty(); return;
      }
      const ridx = +box.dataset.idx; if (!(ridx>-1) || !sc[ridx]) return;
      if (act==='del'){ if (Number.isInteger(draft.specialIndex) && ridx<draft.specialIndex) draft.specialIndex=Math.max(0,draft.specialIndex-1); sc.splice(ridx,1); if (Number.isInteger(draft.specialIndex)) draft.specialIndex=Math.min(draft.specialIndex, sc.length); renderList(); recalcDirty(); return; }
      if (act==='up'){ const prev=view[pos-1]; if (!prev) return; if (prev.kind==='special'){ if (Number.isInteger(draft.specialIndex)) draft.specialIndex=Math.min(sc.length, draft.specialIndex+1); } else { const a=ridx,b=prev.idx; [sc[a],sc[b]]=[sc[b],sc[a]]; } renderList(); recalcDirty(); return; }
      if (act==='down'){ const next=view[pos+1]; if (!next) return; if (next.kind==='special'){ if (Number.isInteger(draft.specialIndex)) draft.specialIndex=Math.max(0, draft.specialIndex-1); } else { const a=ridx,b=next.idx; [sc[a],sc[b]]=[sc[b],sc[a]]; } renderList(); recalcDirty(); return; }
    });
    roles?.addEventListener('change', (e)=>{
      const sel = e.target.closest('select'); if (!sel) return;
      const wrap = sel.closest('[data-kind]'); if (!wrap) return;
      if (wrap.dataset.kind==='special' && sel.matches('[data-role="special-select"]')) { draft.specialRoleType = sel.value; return; }
      if (wrap.dataset.kind==='role' && sel.matches('[data-role="select"]')) {
        const ridx = +wrap.dataset.idx; (draft.scaffold ||= []); draft.scaffold[ridx] ||= { role:'', text:'' }; draft.scaffold[ridx].role = sel.value;
      }
    });
    roles?.addEventListener('input', (e)=>{
      const ta = e.target.closest('textarea[data-role="text"]'); if (!ta) return;
      const wrap = ta.closest('[data-kind="role"]'); if (!wrap) return;
      const ridx = +wrap.dataset.idx; (draft.scaffold ||= []); draft.scaffold[ridx] ||= { role:'user', text:'' }; draft.scaffold[ridx].text = ta.value;
    });
    on($('xiaobaix_sum_hist'), 'input', () => {
      const val = $('xiaobaix_sum_hist')?.value ?? '';
      const hasVal = String(val).trim() !== '' && Number.isFinite(+val);
      if (hasVal && !Number.isInteger(draft.specialIndex)) {
        draft.specialIndex = (draft.scaffold?.length || 0);
        draft.specialRoleType = draft.specialRoleType || 'system';
        renderList();
      }
    });
    on($('xiaobaix_sum_wi'), 'input', () => {
      const checked = !!$('xiaobaix_sum_wi')?.checked;
      if (checked && !Number.isInteger(draft.specialIndex)) {
        draft.specialIndex = (draft.scaffold?.length || 0);
        draft.specialRoleType = draft.specialRoleType || 'system';
        renderList();
      }
    });
    on($('xiaobaix_sum_save_tpl'),'click', async ()=>{
      await saveTaskConfigFromUI('保存完成');
    });
    const providerSel = $('xiaobaix_api_provider');
    const urlInput = $('xiaobaix_api_url');
    const keyInput = $('xiaobaix_api_key');
    const connectBtn = $('xiaobaix_api_connect');
    const modelSelect = $('xiaobaix_api_model_select');
    const modelSelectWrap = $('xiaobaix_api_model_select_wrap');
    const modelText = $('xiaobaix_api_model_text');
    const modelTextWrap = $('xiaobaix_api_model_text_wrap');
    const netCk = $('xiaobaix_api_net');
    const streamCk = $('xiaobaix_api_stream');
    const urlWrap = $('xiaobaix_api_url_wrap');
    const keyWrap = $('xiaobaix_api_key_wrap');
    function applySavedModelToSelect() {
      const cfg2 = loadCfg();
      const saved = String((cfg2?.api?.model)||'').trim() || String(loadApiCfg().model||'').trim();
      if (!modelSelect) return;
      if (!modelSelect.options) return;
      if (saved) {
        let has = false;
        for (const opt of Array.from(modelSelect.options)) { if (opt.value === saved) { has = true; break; } }
        if (!has) {
          const opt = document.createElement('option');
          opt.value = saved; opt.textContent = saved + ' •saved';
          modelSelect.appendChild(opt);
        }
        modelSelect.value = saved;
        if (modelText) modelText.value = saved;
      }
    }
    const setProviderUiState = (pv) => {
      const usingST = pv === 'st';
      const isOpenAI = pv === 'openai';
      urlWrap.classList.toggle('hidden', usingST);
      keyWrap.classList.toggle('hidden', usingST);
      connectBtn.classList.toggle('hidden', !isOpenAI);
      const apiCfgNow = loadApiCfg();
      const hasCache = Array.isArray(apiCfgNow.cache) && apiCfgNow.cache.length > 0;
      modelSelectWrap.classList.toggle('hidden', !isOpenAI || !hasCache);
      modelSelect.classList.toggle('hidden', !isOpenAI || !hasCache);
      modelTextWrap.classList.toggle('hidden', usingST || (isOpenAI && hasCache));
      if (isOpenAI && hasCache) applySavedModelToSelect();
    };
    const apiCfgInit = loadApiCfg();
    providerSel.value = apiCfgInit.provider || 'st';
    urlInput.value = apiCfgInit.url || '';
    keyInput.value = apiCfgInit.key || '';
    modelText.value = apiCfgInit.model || '';
    netCk.checked = !!apiCfgInit.enableNet;
    streamCk.checked = apiCfgInit.stream ?? true;
    if (Array.isArray(apiCfgInit.cache) && apiCfgInit.cache.length > 0) {
      modelSelect.innerHTML = apiCfgInit.cache.map(id => `<option value="${h(id)}">${h(id)}</option>`).join('');
      applySavedModelToSelect();
    } else {
      modelSelect.innerHTML = '';
    }
    setProviderUiState(providerSel.value);
    const getApiModelFromUI = () => {
      const usingSelect = !modelSelectWrap?.classList.contains('hidden') && !modelSelect?.classList.contains('hidden');
      const fromSelect = usingSelect ? String(modelSelect?.value || '').trim() : '';
      const fromText = String(modelText?.value || '').trim();
      return fromSelect || fromText;
    };
    const persistOnChange = () => {
      saveApiCfg({ provider: providerSel.value || 'st', url: urlInput.value.trim(), key: keyInput.value.trim(), model: getApiModelFromUI(), enableNet: !!netCk.checked, stream: !!streamCk.checked });
    };
    on(providerSel, 'change', () => { setProviderUiState(providerSel.value); persistOnChange(); streamEnabled = !!streamCk.checked; });
    on(urlInput, 'input', persistOnChange);
    on(keyInput, 'input', persistOnChange);
    on(modelText, 'input', persistOnChange);
    on(netCk, 'input', persistOnChange);
    on(streamCk, 'input', () => { persistOnChange(); streamEnabled = !!streamCk.checked; });
    on(modelSelect, 'change', async () => {
      const chosen = modelSelect.value || '';
      if (chosen) {
        if (modelText) modelText.value = chosen;
        await saveApiCfg({ model: chosen });
        toastr?.success?.('Đã chọn mô hình');
      }
    });
    on($('xiaobaix_api_save'), 'click', async () => {
      const ok = await saveTaskConfigFromUI('');
      if (!ok) return;
      try {
        await saveApiCfg({
          provider: providerSel.value || 'st',
          url: urlInput.value.trim(),
          key: keyInput.value.trim(),
          model: getApiModelFromUI(),
          enableNet: !!netCk.checked,
          stream: !!streamCk.checked
        });
        toastr?.success?.('Cài đặt API đã được lưu');
      } catch (e) {
        toastr?.error?.(e?.message || 'Lưu thất bại');
      }
    });
    const fetchOpenAIModels = async (baseUrl, apiKey) => {
        const normalize = (url) => String(url || '').replace(/\/+$/,'');
        let url = normalize(baseUrl) + '/v1/models';
        try {
            const res = await fetch(url, { 
                headers: { 
                    'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiKey}`, 
                    'Accept':'application/json' 
                } 
            });
            if (res.ok) {
                const data = await res.json();
                const items = Array.isArray(data?.data) ? data.data.map(m => m?.id).filter(Boolean) : [];
                return [...new Set(items)];
            }
        } catch {}
        if (baseUrl.includes('/v1')) {
            const stripped = normalize(baseUrl.replace(/\/v1\/?$/, ''));
            url = stripped + '/v1/models';
            try {
                const res = await fetch(url, { 
                    headers: { 
                        'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiKey}`, 
                        'Accept':'application/json' 
                    } 
                });
                if (res.ok) {
                    const data = await res.json();
                    const items = Array.isArray(data?.data) ? data.data.map(m => m?.id).filter(Boolean) : [];
                    return [...new Set(items)];
                }
            } catch {}
        }
        throw new Error('Kết nối thất bại,Vui lòng kiểm tra URL và KEY');
    };
    on(connectBtn, 'click', async () => {
        try {
            if (providerSel.value !== 'openai') { 
                toastr?.info?.('Hiện tại chỉ hỗ trợ kéo mô hình tương thích OpenAI'); 
                return; 
            }
            const base = urlInput.value.trim() || 'https://api.openai.com';
            const key = keyInput.value.trim();
            if (!key) { 
                toastr?.warning?.('Vui lòng điền KEY trước'); 
                return; 
            }
            connectBtn.disabled = true; 
            connectBtn.textContent = 'Đang kết nối...';
            const models = await fetchOpenAIModels(base, key);
            if (!models.length) { 
                toastr?.warning?.('Chưa lấy được mô hình'); 
                return; 
            }
            modelSelect.innerHTML = models.map(id => `<option value="${h(id)}">${h(id)}</option>`).join('');
            await saveApiCfg({ cache: models });
            applySavedModelToSelect();
            if (!modelSelect.value && modelSelect.options.length) {
                modelSelect.value = modelSelect.options[0].value;
                await saveApiCfg({ model: modelSelect.value });
            }
            modelSelectWrap.classList.remove('hidden');
            modelSelect.classList.remove('hidden');
            toastr?.success?.(`Lấy thành công: ${models.length} mô hình`);
        } catch (e) {
            toastr?.error?.(e.message || 'Kết nối thất bại');
        } finally {
            connectBtn.disabled = false; 
            connectBtn.textContent = 'Kết nối/Lấy mô hình';
        }
    });

    const updateTitleAnim = () => {
      const chk = $('xiaobaix_sum_enabled');
      const title = $('ny_title_text');
      const txt = $('xiaobaix_sum_enabled_text');
      if (chk) {
        if (chk.checked) {
          if (title) title.classList.add('ny-monitor-active');
          if (txt) txt.textContent = 'Đang chạy';
        } else {
          if (title) title.classList.remove('ny-monitor-active');
          if (txt) txt.textContent = 'Chưa khởi động';
        }
      }
    };
    on($('xiaobaix_sum_enabled'), 'change', updateTitleAnim);
    
    // 初始化折叠事件
    const setupCollapsibles = () => {
      const headers = root.querySelectorAll('.box-header');
      headers.forEach(h => {
        h.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
           if (e.target.closest('button') || e.target.closest('input') || e.target.closest('select')) return;
           const box = h.closest('.box');
           if (box) box.classList.toggle('collapsed');
        });
      });
    };
    setupCollapsibles();

    updateTitleAnim();
  };
  await openUI();
})();
